lines.gurmukhi: ਵੈਸਾਖੁ ਸੁਹਾਵਾ ਤਾਂ ਲਗੈ ਜਾ ਸੰਤੁ ਭੇਟੈ ਹਰਿ ਸੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: vaisaakh suhaavaa taan lagai jaa sant bhettai har soe |3|
lines.english: The month of Vaisaakh is beautiful and pleasant, when the Saint causes me to meet the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਬੇਨਤੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਮਿਲਹੁ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak kee prabh benatee prabh milahu paraapat hoe |
lines.english: Nanak makes this prayer to God: "Please, come and unite me with Yourself."

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਜਣ ਦਾਵਣਿ ਲਗਿਆ ਕਿਸੈ ਨ ਦੇਈ ਬੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: har sajan daavan lagiaa kisai na deee ban |
lines.english: One who has grasped the hem of the robe of the Lord, the True Friend-no one can keep him in bondage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੇਠਿ ਜੁੜੰਦਾ ਲੋੜੀਐ ਜਿਸੁ ਅਗੈ ਸਭਿ ਨਿਵੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: har jetth jurrandaa lorreeai jis agai sabh nivan |
lines.english: In the month of Jayt'h, the bride longs to meet with the Lord. All bow in humility before Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਲੋੜੇ ਸੋ ਕਰੇ ਸੋਈ ਜੀਅ ਕਰੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: jo har lorre so kare soee jeea karan |
lines.english: As the Lord wishes, so He acts, and so His creatures act.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗ ਸਭੇ ਨਾਰਾਇਣੈ ਜੇਤੇ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਵੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: rang sabhe naaraaeinai jete man bhaavan |
lines.english: In the Lord are all pleasures which please the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਣਕ ਮੋਤੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਉਨ ਲਗੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਸੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: maanak motee naam prabh un lagai naahee san |
lines.english: God's Name is the Jewel, the Pearl. It cannot be stolen or taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣ ਲੀਆ ਜੇ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਿਛੁੜਿ ਕਿਉ ਰੋਵੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: aapan leea je milai vichhurr kiau rovan |
lines.english: If people could meet the Lord by their own efforts, why would they be crying out in the pain of separation?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਕੀਤੇ ਆਪਣੇ ਸੇਈ ਕਹੀਅਹਿ ਧੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: jo prabh keete aapane seee kaheeeh dhan |
lines.english: They alone are called blessed, whom God has made His Own.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗੁ ਪਰਾਪਤੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਰੰਗ ਮਾਣੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: saadhoo sang paraapate naanak rang maanan |
lines.english: Meeting Him in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, O Nanak, celestial bliss is enjoyed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੇਠੁ ਰੰਗੀਲਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਧਣੀ ਜਿਸ ਕੈ ਭਾਗੁ ਮਥੰਨਿ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: har jetth rangeelaa tis dhanee jis kai bhaag mathan |4|
lines.english: In the month of Jayt'h, the playful Husband Lord meets her, upon whose forehead such good destiny is recorded. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾੜੁ ਤਪੰਦਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਲਗੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਹੁ ਨ ਜਿੰਨਾ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: aasaarr tapandaa tis lagai har naahu na jinaa paas |
lines.english: The month of Aasaarh seems burning hot, to those who are not close to their Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗਜੀਵਨ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਕੈ ਮਾਣਸ ਸੰਦੀ ਆਸ ॥
lines.translit: jagajeevan purakh tiaag kai maanas sandee aas |
lines.english: They have forsaken God the Primal Being, the Life of the World, and they have come to rely upon mere mortals.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਹਾ ਬੀਜੈ ਸੋ ਲੁਣੈ ਮਥੈ ਜੋ ਲਿਖਿਆਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: jehaa beejai so lunai mathai jo likhiaas |
lines.english: As you plant, so shall you harvest; your destiny is recorded on your forehead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਯੈ ਭਾਇ ਵਿਗੁਚੀਐ ਗਲਿ ਪਈਸੁ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਫਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: duyai bhaae vigucheeai gal pees jam kee faas |
lines.english: In the love of duality, the soul-bride is ruined; around her neck she wears the noose of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕੌ ਸਾਧੂ ਭੇਟੀਐ ਸੋ ਦਰਗਹ ਹੋਇ ਖਲਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin kau saadhoo bhetteeai so daragah hoe khalaas |
lines.english: Those who meet with the Holy Saints are liberated in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੈਣਿ ਵਿਹਾਣੀ ਪਛੁਤਾਣੀ ਉਠਿ ਚਲੀ ਗਈ ਨਿਰਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: rain vihaanee pachhutaanee utth chalee gee niraas |
lines.english: The life-night passes away, and in the end, one comes to regret and repent, and then depart with no hope at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਆਪਣੀ ਤੇਰੇ ਦਰਸਨ ਹੋਇ ਪਿਆਸ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa prabh aapanee tere darasan hoe piaas |
lines.english: Show Your Mercy to me, O God; I am thirsty for the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੁਧੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਕੋ ਨਹੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: prabh tudh bin doojaa ko nahee naanak kee aradaas |
lines.english: Without You, God, there is no other at all. This is Nanak's humble prayer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾੜੁ ਸੁਹੰਦਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਲਗੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣ ਨਿਵਾਸ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: aasaarr suhandaa tis lagai jis man har charan nivaas |5|
lines.english: The month of Aasaarh is pleasant, when the Feet of the Lord abide in the mind. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਵਣਿ ਸਰਸੀ ਕਾਮਣੀ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਸਿਉ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: saavan sarasee kaamanee charan kamal siau piaar |
lines.english: In the month of Saawan, the soul-bride is happy, if she falls in love with the Lotus Feet of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖਿਆ ਰੰਗ ਕੂੜਾਵਿਆ ਦਿਸਨਿ ਸਭੇ ਛਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: bikhiaa rang koorraaviaa disan sabhe chhaar |
lines.english: The pleasures of corruption are false. All that is seen shall turn to ashes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਰਤਾ ਸਚ ਰੰਗਿ ਇਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: man tan rataa sach rang iko naam adhaar |
lines.english: Her mind and body are imbued with the Love of the True One; His Name is her only Support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬੂੰਦ ਸੁਹਾਵਣੀ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਪੀਵਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: har amrit boond suhaavanee mil saadhoo peevanahaar |
lines.english: The drops of the Lord's Nectar are so beautiful! Meeting the Holy Saint, we drink these in.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਣੁ ਤਿਣੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਉਲਿਆ ਸੰਮ੍ਰਥ ਪੁਰਖ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: van tin prabh sang mauliaa samrath purakh apaar |
lines.english: The forests and the meadows are rejuvenated and refreshed with the Love of God, the All-powerful, Infinite Primal Being.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਸਖੀਏ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹੰਉ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: jinee sakhee prabh paaeaa hnau tin kai sad balihaar |
lines.english: Those brides who have obtained God-I am forever a sacrifice to them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮਿਲਣੈ ਨੋ ਮਨੁ ਲੋਚਦਾ ਕਰਮਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: har milanai no man lochadaa karam milaavanahaar |
lines.english: My mind yearns to meet the Lord. If only He would show His Mercy, and unite me with Himself!

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਜੀ ਮਇਆ ਕਰਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਵਾਰਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak har jee meaa kar sabad savaaranahaar |
lines.english: O Nanak, when the Dear Lord shows kindness, He adorns His bride with the Word of His Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਵਣੁ ਤਿਨਾ ਸੁਹਾਗਣੀ ਜਿਨ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਉਰਿ ਹਾਰੁ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: saavan tinaa suhaaganee jin raam naam ur haar |6|
lines.english: Saawan is delightful for those happy soul-brides whose hearts are adorned with the Necklace of the Lord's Name. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਸੀਗਾਰ ਬਣਾਇਆ ਕਾਰਜਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੇਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: lakh seegaar banaaeaa kaaraj naahee ket |
lines.english: She may wear thousands of ornaments, but they are of no use at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਦੁਇ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਣੀਆ ਦੂਜੈ ਲਗਾ ਹੇਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: bhaadue bharam bhulaaneea doojai lagaa het |
lines.english: In the month of Bhaadon, she is deluded by doubt, because of her attachment to duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਕੜਿ ਚਲਾਇਨਿ ਦੂਤ ਜਮ ਕਿਸੈ ਨ ਦੇਨੀ ਭੇਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: pakarr chalaaein doot jam kisai na denee bhet |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death seizes and holds her, and does not tell anyone his secret.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਦਿਨਿ ਦੇਹ ਬਿਨਸਸੀ ਤਿਤੁ ਵੇਲੈ ਕਹਸਨਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: jit din deh binasasee tith velai kahasan pret |
lines.english: On that day when the body perishes-at that time, she becomes a ghost.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਡਿ ਖੜੋਤੇ ਖਿਨੈ ਮਾਹਿ ਜਿਨ ਸਿਉ ਲਗਾ ਹੇਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: chhadd kharrote khinai maeh jin siau lagaa het |
lines.english: And her loved ones-in an instant, they move on, leaving her all alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਥ ਮਰੋੜੈ ਤਨੁ ਕਪੇ ਸਿਆਹਹੁ ਹੋਆ ਸੇਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: hath marorrai tan kape siaahahu hoaa set |
lines.english: She wrings her hands, her body writhes in pain, and she turns from black to white.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਚਰਣ ਬੋਹਿਥ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦੇਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak prabh saranaagatee charan bohith prabh det |
lines.english: Nanak seeks God's Sanctuary; God has given him the Boat of His Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਹਾ ਬੀਜੈ ਸੋ ਲੁਣੈ ਕਰਮਾ ਸੰਦੜਾ ਖੇਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: jehaa beejai so lunai karamaa sandarraa khet |
lines.english: As she has planted, so does she harvest; such is the field of karma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸੁਨਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਉਮਾਹੜਾ ਕਿਉ ਮਿਲੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: asun prem umaaharraa kiau mileeai har jaae |
lines.english: In the month of Assu, my love for the Lord overwhelms me. How can I go and meet the Lord?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਭਾਦੁਇ ਨਰਕਿ ਨ ਪਾਈਅਹਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਰਖਣ ਵਾਲਾ ਹੇਤੁ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: se bhaadue narak na paaeeeh gur rakhan vaalaa het |7|
lines.english: Those who love the Guru, the Protector and Savior, in Bhaadon, shall not be thrown down into hell. ||7||
